description: Manual vs automatic processing, side by side: four open-top tanks DEV/STOP/FIX/WASH with film hanger and operator glyphs (time, temperature, agitation) vs processor cutaway — feed tray, serpentine roller path through DEV/FIX/WASH, heated dryer, TIME+TEMP locked chip, finished radiograph at the exit slot with 8-12 min dry-to-dry badge.
